title: Health agreements - Canada.ca
content:
Health agreements about issues that concern the Canadian health care system and impact the health of Canadians

## Services and information
How we’re working with our partners to help you get the medications you need

### Working together to improve health care in Canada
Working Together bilateral agreements, Aging  with Dignity bilateral agreements, Home and Community Care, and Mental Health  and Addictions Services bilateral agreements

### Pan-Canadian AI for Health (AI4H) Guiding Principles
Guiding principles on the responsible and ethical use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies in Canada’s health systems

### Drugs for rare diseases
This funding will help increase access to and affordability of effective drugs for rare diseases and contribute to improving the health of patients across Canada

### Charter of Relationship Principles for Nishnawbe Aski Nation Territory
A partnership to support a new system-wide approach to health for Nishnawbe Aski Nation territory

### Pan-Canadian Virtual Care Priorities in Response to COVID-19
Provincial and territorial funding agreements to accelerate virtual care services for those who need continued care during COVID-19

### Improving affordable access to prescription drugs
Funding agreement to expand Prince Edward Island's public formulary and improve the affordability of its public drug plans

### COVID-19 Proof of Vaccination Fund
Provincial and territorial support for past and ongoing operationalization of proof of vaccination programming

### Expanding mental health support for first responders and frontline health workers
Funding agreement with Ontario to support the mental health and substance use support for first responders and frontline workers
- Public Health Agency of Canada
